title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nucleus Software International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
